question_types: Practical/Hands-On (exploit vulnerable machines, submit proof.txt files)

testing_centers.notes: All OffSec exams are taken online via OffSec's own proctored VPN lab environment. No external testing centers. Must use OffSec-provided VPN connection.

id_requirements: Valid government-issued photo ID shown to proctor via webcam at exam start.
exam_rules: Fully open-book/open-internet exam — research is allowed and expected. Automated tools like Metasploit are restricted (limited use for OSCP). Must write a professional penetration test report submitted within 24 hours after exam. AI-assisted answer generation is prohibited. Proctor monitors via webcam throughout.

retake_policy.notes: Retake attempts can be purchased separately. No mandatory waiting period. Retake pricing varies by course bundle.

domains.name: Rogue Access Points and Evil Twin Attacks

official_study_resources.title: OffSec Learning Library (PEN-200/WEB-300/EXP-301)
official_study_resources.notes: Course material, lab time, and one exam attempt typically bundled together
